name: docflow
description: DocFlow — a lightweight collaborative document editor (rich-text editing, file upload, sharing, persistence).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @docflow/api" "npm run dev -w @docflow/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @docflow/api && npm run typecheck -w @docflow/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @docflow/api && npm run test -w @docflow/web
